# Chapter Two

By morning the rain had stopped. She made coffee, reread the letter, and decided what to do.

> "Trust the evidence, not the story you want to believe."

It was something her mother used to say. She had not understood it as a child. She understood it now.

| Clue | Source | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postmark | Letter | Verified |
| Signature | Letter | Pending |

She put on her coat and walked out into the cold.
